title: Recovery Drive
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: To open Recovery Drive you can use one of the following methods: From Start, search for Recovery Drive and select it
When the tool opens, make sure Back up system files to the recovery drive is selected and then select Next
Connect a USB drive to your PC, select it, and then select Next
Select Create . Many files need to be copied to the recovery media, so this might take a while

sections.title: Reinstall Windows with a recovery drive
